title: tagetes lanceolata
intro: Tagetes lanceolata, also known as Mexican marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its bright orange and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tagetes lanceolata include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as possessing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
